# Chapter 2: Metabolism and bioenergetics  (~100 pp)
- 2.1 ATP as the universal currency (12) · 2.2 Glycolysis, TCA, oxidative phosphorylation (18) · 2.3 Photosynthesis (15) · 2.4 Metabolic flux analysis (15) · 2.5 Free-energy balances in cells (15) · 2.6 Worked examples: muscle contraction, fermentation, photosynthesis efficiency (15) · 2.7 Failure section: metabolic disease, thermodynamic limits violated by hype (10)

**Archetype**: balance, transport. **Project**: estimate the daily ATP turnover of an adult human three ways. **Exercises**: 30.
